feed.title: They Said So — Quote & Verse of the Day
feed.subtitle: Daily quotes across categories (inspire, life, love, art, management, sports, funny, nature) plus a daily Bible verse from theysaidso.com.

entry.title: Mr. Klamp laid down the law. No tardiness, no talking above 40 decibels, no untied shoelaces, no visible undergarments, no eating, no chewing gum, no chewing tobacco, no chewing betel nuts, no chewing coca leaves, no chewing out students (unless Mr. Klamp was doing the chewing out), no chewing out t
entry.content: Mr. Klamp laid down the law. No tardiness, no talking above 40 decibels, no untied shoelaces, no visible undergarments, no eating, no chewing gum, no chewing tobacco, no chewing betel nuts, no chewing coca leaves, no chewing out students (unless Mr. Klamp was doing the chewing out), no chewing out teachers (unless ditto), no unnecessary displays of temper (unless ditto), no unnecessary displays of affection (no exceptions), no pets over one ounce or under one ton, and no singing, except in Bulgarian. I began to think Mr Klamp wouldn't be so bad.. - Polly Shulman
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: Art produces ugly things which frequently become more beautiful with time. Fashion, on the other hand, produces beautiful things which always become ugly with time. - Jean Cocteau
entry.content: Art produces ugly things which frequently become more beautiful with time. Fashion, on the other hand, produces beautiful things which always become ugly with time. - Jean Cocteau
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: Once I opened up a fortune cookie and inside was the guy's cheque next to me I said hey buddy I got your cheque he said thanks - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: Once I opened up a fortune cookie and inside was the guy's cheque next to me I said hey buddy I got your cheque he said thanks - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: I don't know any other way to lead but by example. - Don Shula
entry.content: I don't know any other way to lead but by example. - Don Shula
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: It is better to lead from behind and to put others in front, especially when you celebrate victory when nice things occur. You take the front line when there is danger. Then people will appreciate your leadership. - Nelson Mandela
entry.content: It is better to lead from behind and to put others in front, especially when you celebrate victory when nice things occur. You take the front line when there is danger. Then people will appreciate your leadership. - Nelson Mandela
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: Love is a smoke made with the fume of sighs. - William Shakespeare
entry.content: Love is a smoke made with the fume of sighs. - William Shakespeare
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: God writes a lot of comedy.. The trouble is, he's stuck with so many bad actors who don't know how to play funny. - Garrison Keillor
entry.content: God writes a lot of comedy.. The trouble is, he's stuck with so many bad actors who don't know how to play funny. - Garrison Keillor
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: Those who know how to win are much more numerous than those who know how to make proper use of their victories - Polybius
entry.content: Those who know how to win are much more numerous than those who know how to make proper use of their victories - Polybius
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: The chief wonder of education is that it does not ruin everybody concerned in it, teachers and taught. - Henry Adams
entry.content: The chief wonder of education is that it does not ruin everybody concerned in it, teachers and taught. - Henry Adams
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: Painting, n.: The art of protecting flat surfaces from the weather, and exposing them to the critic. - Ambrose Bierce
entry.content: Painting, n.: The art of protecting flat surfaces from the weather, and exposing them to the critic. - Ambrose Bierce
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: My wife has to be the worst cook. In my house, we pray after we eat. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: My wife has to be the worst cook. In my house, we pray after we eat. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: Baseball hasn't been the national pastime for many years now - no sport is. The national pastime, like it or not, is watching television. - Bob Greene
entry.content: Baseball hasn't been the national pastime for many years now - no sport is. The national pastime, like it or not, is watching television. - Bob Greene
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: The leader is one who mobilizes others toward a goal shared by leaders and followers.. Leaders, followers and goals make up the three equally necessary supports for leadership. - Gary Wills
entry.content: The leader is one who mobilizes others toward a goal shared by leaders and followers.. Leaders, followers and goals make up the three equally necessary supports for leadership. - Gary Wills
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: Love is much nicer to be in than an automobile accident, a tight girdle, a higher tax bracket or a holding pattern over Philadelphia. - Judith Viorst
entry.content: Love is much nicer to be in than an automobile accident, a tight girdle, a higher tax bracket or a holding pattern over Philadelphia. - Judith Viorst
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: Life is not an exact science, it is an art. - Samuel Butler
entry.content: Life is not an exact science, it is an art. - Samuel Butler
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: Winning isn't everything.. It's the only thing. - Vincent van Gogh
entry.content: Winning isn't everything.. It's the only thing. - Vincent van Gogh
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: An exceedingly confident student would in theory make a terrible student. Why would he take school seriously when he feels that he can outwit his teachers? - Criss Jami
entry.content: An exceedingly confident student would in theory make a terrible student. Why would he take school seriously when he feels that he can outwit his teachers? - Criss Jami
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: The artist is nothing without the gift, but the gift is nothing without work. - Emile Zola
entry.content: The artist is nothing without the gift, but the gift is nothing without work. - Emile Zola
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: Why her cooking is so bad that the flies pitched in to fix the screen door. I leave dental floss in the kitchen and watch the roaches hang themselves. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: Why her cooking is so bad that the flies pitched in to fix the screen door. I leave dental floss in the kitchen and watch the roaches hang themselves. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: Black people dominate sports in the United States. 20% of the population and 90% of the final four. We own this shit. Basketball, baseball, football, golf, tennis, and as soon as they make a heated hockey rink we'll take that shit too. - Chris Rock
entry.content: Black people dominate sports in the United States. 20% of the population and 90% of the final four. We own this shit. Basketball, baseball, football, golf, tennis, and as soon as they make a heated hockey rink we'll take that shit too. - Chris Rock
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: If you think you're leading and no one is following you, then you're only taking a walk. - Afghan Proverb
entry.content: If you think you're leading and no one is following you, then you're only taking a walk. - Afghan Proverb
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: Stand by your man. Give him two arms to cling to and something warm to come to. - Tammy Wynette
entry.content: Stand by your man. Give him two arms to cling to and something warm to come to. - Tammy Wynette
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: The purpose of art is washing the dust of daily life off our souls. - Pablo Picasso
entry.content: The purpose of art is washing the dust of daily life off our souls. - Pablo Picasso
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: A quitter never wins and a winner never quits - Napoleon Hill
entry.content: A quitter never wins and a winner never quits - Napoleon Hill
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: The purpose of school should not be to prepare students for more school. We should be seeking to have fully engaged students now. - Donalyn Miller
entry.content: The purpose of school should not be to prepare students for more school. We should be seeking to have fully engaged students now. - Donalyn Miller
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: A piece of art is never a finished work. It answers a question which has been asked, and asks a new question. - Robert Engman
entry.content: A piece of art is never a finished work. It answers a question which has been asked, and asks a new question. - Robert Engman
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: One night she told me to put out the garbage. I told her you cooked it, you take it out. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: One night she told me to put out the garbage. I told her you cooked it, you take it out. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: What the British must never believe about themselves is that they are good at games, strong in adversity, but lousy in bed. It is a myth invented by jealous foreigners. - Gerald McKnight
entry.content: What the British must never believe about themselves is that they are good at games, strong in adversity, but lousy in bed. It is a myth invented by jealous foreigners. - Gerald McKnight
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: All of the great leaders have had one characteristic in common: it was the willingness to confront unequivocally the major anxiety of their people in their time. This, and not much else, is the essence of leadership. - John Kenneth Galbraith
entry.content: All of the great leaders have had one characteristic in common: it was the willingness to confront unequivocally the major anxiety of their people in their time. This, and not much else, is the essence of leadership. - John Kenneth Galbraith
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: To fall in love is easy, even to remain in it is not difficult; our human loneliness is cause enough. But it is a hard quest worth making to find a comrade through whose steady presence one becomes steadily the person one desires to be. - Elijah Wood
entry.content: To fall in love is easy, even to remain in it is not difficult; our human loneliness is cause enough. But it is a hard quest worth making to find a comrade through whose steady presence one becomes steadily the person one desires to be. - Elijah Wood
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: I am now going to make you a gift that will stay with you the rest of your life. For the rest of your life, every time you say 'We've always done it that way,' my ghost will appear and haunt you for twentyfour hours. - Grace Murray Hopper
entry.content: I am now going to make you a gift that will stay with you the rest of your life. For the rest of your life, every time you say 'We've always done it that way,' my ghost will appear and haunt you for twentyfour hours. - Grace Murray Hopper
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: The real winners in life are the people who look at every situation with an expectation that they can make it work or make it better - Barbara Pletcher
entry.content: The real winners in life are the people who look at every situation with an expectation that they can make it work or make it better - Barbara Pletcher
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: By starving the sensibility of our pupils we only make them easier prey to the propagandist when he comes. For famished nature will be avenged and a hard heart is no infallible protection against a soft head. - C.S. Lewis
entry.content: By starving the sensibility of our pupils we only make them easier prey to the propagandist when he comes. For famished nature will be avenged and a hard heart is no infallible protection against a soft head. - C.S. Lewis
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: Art reaches its greatest peak when devoid of self-consciousness. Freedom discovers man the moment he loses concern over what impression he is making or about to make. - Bruce Lee
entry.content: Art reaches its greatest peak when devoid of self-consciousness. Freedom discovers man the moment he loses concern over what impression he is making or about to make. - Bruce Lee
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: For Christmas one year I bought my son a BB gun. He bought me a tshirt with a bulls eye on the back. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: For Christmas one year I bought my son a BB gun. He bought me a tshirt with a bulls eye on the back. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: Anybody with ability can play in the big leagues. But to be able to trick people year in and year out the way I did, I think that was a much greater feat. - Bob Uecker
entry.content: Anybody with ability can play in the big leagues. But to be able to trick people year in and year out the way I did, I think that was a much greater feat. - Bob Uecker
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: The only real training for leadership is leadership. - Anthony Jay
entry.content: The only real training for leadership is leadership. - Anthony Jay
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: A man in love is incomplete until he has married. Then he's finished. - Zsa Zsa Gabor
entry.content: A man in love is incomplete until he has married. Then he's finished. - Zsa Zsa Gabor
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: Perpetual inspiration is as necessary to the life of goodness, holiness and happiness as perpetual respiration is necessary to animal life. - Andrew Bonar Law
entry.content: Perpetual inspiration is as necessary to the life of goodness, holiness and happiness as perpetual respiration is necessary to animal life. - Andrew Bonar Law
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: Winners have simply formed the habit of doing things losers don't like to do - Albert Gray
entry.content: Winners have simply formed the habit of doing things losers don't like to do - Albert Gray
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: Do you want to achieve something or do you just want to make money? Asked a nearby man in a white shirt to another man in a striped shirt. I waited for the answer as I slowly walked past them. Why is it an either or question? The man in the striped shirt finally murmured philosophically under a sip
entry.content: Do you want to achieve something or do you just want to make money? Asked a nearby man in a white shirt to another man in a striped shirt. I waited for the answer as I slowly walked past them. Why is it an either or question? The man in the striped shirt finally murmured philosophically under a sip of beer. They both stood there looking at each other in thought. - Daniel Amory
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: Art is when you hear a knocking from your soul and you answer. - Terri Guillemets
entry.content: Art is when you hear a knocking from your soul and you answer. - Terri Guillemets
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: She looked at my calendar and wanted to know who JUNE was. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: She looked at my calendar and wanted to know who JUNE was. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: Whoever wants to know the heart and mind of America had better learn baseball, the rules and realities of the game - and do it by watching first some high school or small-town teams. - Jacques Barzun
entry.content: Whoever wants to know the heart and mind of America had better learn baseball, the rules and realities of the game - and do it by watching first some high school or small-town teams. - Jacques Barzun
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: Men make history, and not the other way around. In periods where there is no leadership, society stands still. Progress occurs when courageous, skillful leaders seize the opportunity to change things for the better. - Harry S Truman
entry.content: Men make history, and not the other way around. In periods where there is no leadership, society stands still. Progress occurs when courageous, skillful leaders seize the opportunity to change things for the better. - Harry S Truman
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: Who will tell whether one happy moment of love or the joy of breathing or walking on a bright morning and smelling the fresh air, is not worth all the suffering and effort which life implies. - Erich Fromm
entry.content: Who will tell whether one happy moment of love or the joy of breathing or walking on a bright morning and smelling the fresh air, is not worth all the suffering and effort which life implies. - Erich Fromm
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: I'm not naive. I realise that quality of life and income are inextricably bound together, but sooner or later we're going to have to ask ourselves whether it is possible to make life more meaningful without charging it to Visa. - Daron Hicklin
entry.content: I'm not naive. I realise that quality of life and income are inextricably bound together, but sooner or later we're going to have to ask ourselves whether it is possible to make life more meaningful without charging it to Visa. - Daron Hicklin
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: Think ahead. Don't let day-to-day operations drive out planning. - Donald Rumsfeld
entry.content: Think ahead. Don't let day-to-day operations drive out planning. - Donald Rumsfeld
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: We, Equality 7-2521, were not happy in those year in the Home of the Students. It was not that the learning was too hard for us. It was that the learning was too easy. This is a great sin, to be born with a head which is too quick. It is not good to be different from our brothers, but it is evil to
entry.content: We, Equality 7-2521, were not happy in those year in the Home of the Students. It was not that the learning was too hard for us. It was that the learning was too easy. This is a great sin, to be born with a head which is too quick. It is not good to be different from our brothers, but it is evil to be superior to them. The Teachers told us so, and they frowned when they looked at us. - Ayn Rand
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: To draw, you must close your eyes and sing. - Pablo Picasso
entry.content: To draw, you must close your eyes and sing. - Pablo Picasso
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: Boy is my wife stupid. It takes her and hour and a half to watch 60 minutes. My daughters no bargain either. In public school she was voted most likely to conceive. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: Boy is my wife stupid. It takes her and hour and a half to watch 60 minutes. My daughters no bargain either. In public school she was voted most likely to conceive. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: Love is the most important thing in the world, but baseball is pretty good, too. - Yogi Berra
entry.content: Love is the most important thing in the world, but baseball is pretty good, too. - Yogi Berra
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: Great leaders are pragmatists who can deal with difficult realities but still have the optimism and courage to act. - Nitin Nohria
entry.content: Great leaders are pragmatists who can deal with difficult realities but still have the optimism and courage to act. - Nitin Nohria
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: About all you can do in life is be who you are. Some people will love you for you. Most will love you for what you can do for them, and some won't like you at all. - Rita Mae Brown
entry.content: About all you can do in life is be who you are. Some people will love you for you. Most will love you for what you can do for them, and some won't like you at all. - Rita Mae Brown
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams. Live the life you've imagined. As you simplify your life, the laws of the universe will be simpler. - Henry David Thoreau
entry.content: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams. Live the life you've imagined. As you simplify your life, the laws of the universe will be simpler. - Henry David Thoreau
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: Let our advance worrying become advance thinking and planning. - Winston Churchill
entry.content: Let our advance worrying become advance thinking and planning. - Winston Churchill
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: I tell my students, 'When you get these jobs that you have been so brilliantly trained for, just remember that your real job is that if you are free, you need to free somebody else. If you have some power, then your job is to empower somebody else. This is not just a grab-bag candy game. - Toni Morr
entry.content: I tell my students, 'When you get these jobs that you have been so brilliantly trained for, just remember that your real job is that if you are free, you need to free somebody else. If you have some power, then your job is to empower somebody else. This is not just a grab-bag candy game. - Toni Morrison
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: Art doesn't have to be pretty. It has to be meaningful. - Duane Hanson
entry.content: Art doesn't have to be pretty. It has to be meaningful. - Duane Hanson
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: She failed her drivers test. She couldn't get used to the front seat. It took her four lessons to learn to sit up. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: She failed her drivers test. She couldn't get used to the front seat. It took her four lessons to learn to sit up. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: By the time you get to your ball, if you don't know what to do with it, try another sport. - Julius Boros
entry.content: By the time you get to your ball, if you don't know what to do with it, try another sport. - Julius Boros
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: Never neglect details. When everyone's mind is dulled or distracted the leader must be doubly vigilant. - Colin Powell
entry.content: Never neglect details. When everyone's mind is dulled or distracted the leader must be doubly vigilant. - Colin Powell
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: Not where I breathe, but where I love, I live Not where I love, but where I am, I die. - Robert Southey
entry.content: Not where I breathe, but where I love, I live Not where I love, but where I am, I die. - Robert Southey
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: Only a life lived for others is a life worthwhile. - Albert Einstein
entry.content: Only a life lived for others is a life worthwhile. - Albert Einstein
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: If you want to test your memory, try to recall what you were worrying about one year ago today. - E. Joseph Cossman
entry.content: If you want to test your memory, try to recall what you were worrying about one year ago today. - E. Joseph Cossman
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: Rejection is an opportunity for your selection. - Bernard Branson
entry.content: Rejection is an opportunity for your selection. - Bernard Branson
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: The whole culture is telling you to hurry, while the art tells you to take your time. Always listen to the art. - Junot Diaz
entry.content: The whole culture is telling you to hurry, while the art tells you to take your time. Always listen to the art. - Junot Diaz
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: I came from a real tough neighborhood. In the local restaurant I sat down and had broken leg of lamb. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: I came from a real tough neighborhood. In the local restaurant I sat down and had broken leg of lamb. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: Football isn't a contact sport, it's a collision sport. Dancing is a contact sport. - Duffy Daugherty
entry.content: Football isn't a contact sport, it's a collision sport. Dancing is a contact sport. - Duffy Daugherty
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: The task of the leader is to get his people from where they are to where they have not been. - Henry Kissinger
entry.content: The task of the leader is to get his people from where they are to where they have not been. - Henry Kissinger
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: Love seeks one thing only the good of the one loved. It leaves all the other secondary effects to take care of themselves. Love, therefore, is its own reward. - Thomas Merton
entry.content: Love seeks one thing only the good of the one loved. It leaves all the other secondary effects to take care of themselves. Love, therefore, is its own reward. - Thomas Merton
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: The only religious way to think of death is as a part and parcel of life to regard it, with the understanding and the emotions, as the inviolable condition of life. - Thomas Mann
entry.content: The only religious way to think of death is as a part and parcel of life to regard it, with the understanding and the emotions, as the inviolable condition of life. - Thomas Mann
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: Luck is a dividend of sweat. The more you sweat, the luckier you get - Ray Kroc
entry.content: Luck is a dividend of sweat. The more you sweat, the luckier you get - Ray Kroc
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: No student knows his subject: the most he knows is where and how to find out the things he does not know - Woodrow T. Wilson
entry.content: No student knows his subject: the most he knows is where and how to find out the things he does not know - Woodrow T. Wilson
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: The main thing is to be moved, to love, to hope, to tremble, to live. - Auguste Rodin
entry.content: The main thing is to be moved, to love, to hope, to tremble, to live. - Auguste Rodin
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: I came from a real tough neighborhood. Once a guy pulled a knife on me. I knew he wasn't a professional, the knife had butter on it. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: I came from a real tough neighborhood. Once a guy pulled a knife on me. I knew he wasn't a professional, the knife had butter on it. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: Serious sport has nothing to do with fair play. It is bound up with hatred, jealousy, boastfulness, disregard of all rules and sadistic pleasure in witnessing violence. In other words, it is war minus the shooting. - George Orwell
entry.content: Serious sport has nothing to do with fair play. It is bound up with hatred, jealousy, boastfulness, disregard of all rules and sadistic pleasure in witnessing violence. In other words, it is war minus the shooting. - George Orwell
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: No man will make a great leader who wants to do it all himself, or to get all the credit for doing it - Andrew Carnegie
entry.content: No man will make a great leader who wants to do it all himself, or to get all the credit for doing it - Andrew Carnegie
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: Love seems the swiftest, but it is the slowest of growths. No man or woman really knows what perfect love is until they have been married a quarter of a century. - Mark Twain
entry.content: Love seems the swiftest, but it is the slowest of growths. No man or woman really knows what perfect love is until they have been married a quarter of a century. - Mark Twain
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: The art of living is more like wrestling than dancing. - Marcus Aurelius
entry.content: The art of living is more like wrestling than dancing. - Marcus Aurelius
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: There's such a thin line between winning and losing. - John R. Tunis
entry.content: There's such a thin line between winning and losing. - John R. Tunis
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: A student never forgets an encouraging private word, when it is given with sincere respect and admiration. - William Lyon Phelps
entry.content: A student never forgets an encouraging private word, when it is given with sincere respect and admiration. - William Lyon Phelps
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: You don't make art out of good intentions. - Gustave Flaubert
entry.content: You don't make art out of good intentions. - Gustave Flaubert
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: I once asked a policeman how far it was to the subway. He said, I don't know, no one has ever made it. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: I once asked a policeman how far it was to the subway. He said, I don't know, no one has ever made it. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: The triple is the most exciting play in baseball. Home runs win a lot of games, but I never understood why fans are so obsessed with them. - Hank Aaron
entry.content: The triple is the most exciting play in baseball. Home runs win a lot of games, but I never understood why fans are so obsessed with them. - Hank Aaron
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: Leadership is a word and a concept that has been more argued than almost any other I know. I am not one of the desk-pounding types that likes to stick out his jaw and look like he is bossing the show. I would far rather get behind and, recognizing the frailties and the requirements of human nature,
entry.content: Leadership is a word and a concept that has been more argued than almost any other I know. I am not one of the desk-pounding types that likes to stick out his jaw and look like he is bossing the show. I would far rather get behind and, recognizing the frailties and the requirements of human nature, would rather try to persuade a man to go along, because once I have persuaded him, he will stick. If I scare him, he will stay just as long as he is scared, and then he is gone. - Dwight David Eisenhower
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: Love many things, for therein lies the true strength, and whosoever loves much performs much, and can accomplish much, and what is done in love is done well. - Vincent Van Gogh
entry.content: Love many things, for therein lies the true strength, and whosoever loves much performs much, and can accomplish much, and what is done in love is done well. - Vincent Van Gogh
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: Life has meaning only if one barters it day by day for something other than itself. - Antoine de SaintExupery
entry.content: Life has meaning only if one barters it day by day for something other than itself. - Antoine de SaintExupery
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: When you win, say nothing. When you lose, say less. - Paul Brown
entry.content: When you win, say nothing. When you lose, say less. - Paul Brown
entry.dc:creator: Inspire
